chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 50 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 28-09-2021 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner nor is any intimation received, whereas, Ghulam Shabbir Kalhoro, Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Kingri is in attendance and submits that grievance of the petitioner stands redressed as sale certificate has been issued. On such statement, the Petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
